section.heading: Prohibition on smoking on Amtrak trains

subsection.heading: Prohibition.—
subsection.content: Beginning on the date of enactment of this section, Amtrak shall prohibit smoking, including the use of electronic cigarettes, onboard all Amtrak trains.

subsection.heading: Electronic Cigarette Defined.—
subsection.content: In this section, the term “electronic cigarette” means a device that delivers nicotine or other substances to a user of the device in the form of a vapor that is inhaled to simulate the experience of smoking.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 117–58, div. B, title II, § 22209(a), Nov. 15, 2021, 135 Stat. 707.)

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: The date of enactment of this section, referred to in subsec. (a), is the date of enactment of title II of div. B of Pub. L. 117–58, which was approved Nov. 15, 2021.
